zh.Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de: 法國瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy於1135年出生在法國時，她的父親Guy de Marolles26歲，母親Isabella von Nagis18歲。她於1150年與Josselin De Melun II在法國i萊-德-福朗斯默倫結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1160年之後在她的家鄉。

zh-hans.Melun-Sud, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de: 法国瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-素德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy于1135年出生在法国时，她的父亲Guy de Marolles26岁，母亲Isabella von Nagis18岁。她于1150年与Josselin De Melun II在法国i萊-德-福朗斯默倫结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1160年之后在她的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dame
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and French: from Middle English, Old French dame ‘lady’ (from Latin domina ‘mistress’), applied as a nickname for a foppish young man whose outfit and manner have an effeminate elegance, or as a metonymic occupational name for someone in the service of a lady. As a French name it may also be a nickname meaning ‘mother-in-law’.
English: possibly an East Anglian variant of   Dam   4.

variants.name: Dam
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Hoa, Tuan, Ngoc, Thanh, Binh, Chanh, Duc, Hiep, Minh, Nu, Tien.  Southeast Asian Hong, Chan, Dong, Hon, Man, Oi, Ok, Phoung, Sang, Sokhom, Sun.
Vietnamese (Đàm): from the Chinese surnames 譚, 谈 and 覃, see Tan 1-3.
Cambodian: written ដាំ, possibly of Vietnamese origin (see above). The surname ដាំ also corresponds to the Khmer word meaning e.g. ‘to plant’.

nameMeanings.name: Blandy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Blundy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): probably a habitational name from Blandy in Seine-et-Marne, France.

nameMeanings.name: Alpaïs
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English all ‘all’ + peis, pes ‘peace’, perhaps to be interpreted as ‘completely peaceable’ or ‘completely silent’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy was born in 1135, in France, her father, Guy de Marolles, was 26 and her mother, Isabella von Nagis, was 18. She married Josselin De Melun II in 1150, in Melun, Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died after 1160, in her hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy est née en 1135, à France, son père, Guy de Marolles, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Isabella von Nagis, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Josselin De Melun II en 1150, à Melun, Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée après 1160, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy 1135 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy de Marolles 26 und ihre Mutter Isabella von Nagis 18. Sie hat 1150 in Melun, Île-de-France, Frankreich Josselin De Melun II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1160 in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy è nata il nel 1135 nel Francia, sua padre, Guy de Marolles, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Isabella von Nagis, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Josselin De Melun II nel 1150, nel Melun, Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il 1160, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandyが1135年にフランスで生まれた時，父Guy de Marollesは26歳，母Isabella von Nagisは18歳であった。1150年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスメルンでJosselin De Melun IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1160年以後に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy(이)가 1135년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy de Marolles(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella von Nagis(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1150년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 멜루에서 Josselin De Melun II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1160년 이후 그녀의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy nasceu em 1135, em França, seu pai, Guy de Marolles, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Isabella von Nagis, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Josselin De Melun II em 1150, em Melun, Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu após 1160, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy родилась в 1135 г. в местности Франция, её отцу по имени Guy de Marolles было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabella von Nagis, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Josselin De Melun II в 1150 г. в местности мелун, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла после 1160 г. в её родном городе.

sm.from 1155 to 1160: mai le 1155 e o'o I le 1160

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alpaïs de Marolles, Dame de Blandy nació en 1135, en Francia, su papá, Guy de Marolles, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Isabella von Nagis, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Josselin De Melun II en 1150, en Melun, Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de 1160, en su pueblo.
